hero.title: The smile
hero.subtitle: We design the smile that speaks the same language as your goals. Made with you, in our own lab.

home.introText: We don't make catalogue smiles. We co-create a smile that feels yours, with art, science and our own lab.
home.resultsSubtitle: A smile is no longer perceived as an aesthetic complement, but as a key feature of your identity, status, confidence, and security.
home.ctaText: Not just a treatment, it's a conversation where we design your smile in 3D together, you try it before we touch anything, and we sculpt it by hand. In less than two weeks, the smile from the screen will be on your face forever.

team.title: Expert hands behind every smile
team.subtitle: Tap a profile to meet them. A small team for genuinely personal care.

about.title: Smile Architecture
about.introText: In a market where aesthetics integrates with well-being, a smile becomes an identity asset, and luxury is expressed through experience and trust, clinical results are no longer enough to explain a patient's choice.

identity.title: Our Identity
identity.box1Text: An international network of aesthetic dentistry clinics founded in Colombia, led by Dr. Martín Prato, with a presence in Latin America and the US, and now Europe.
identity.box2Text: We understand the smile as personalized architecture: a combination of art, science, and aesthetic sensibility that does not seek just to improve teeth, but to transform the confidence and identity of people.
identity.box3Text: Our own methodology, high level of personalization, and a deeply human boutique experience, where attention, care, and patient accompaniment are the main driver of our value proposition.

about.clinicDesc: Our boutique clinic in the heart of Madrid, designed to offer you an exclusive, private, and relaxing experience.
about.labDesc: High-tech in-house laboratory where we design and customize each piece by hand with maximum precision.
about.financeDesc: We believe excellence should be accessible. We offer personalized financing plans so you can invest in your smile with complete peace of mind.

why.title: The difference is in the detail

items.title: Our own lab
items.description: We make your smile here, with no middlemen. Full control and shorter times.

items.title: See your smile first

items.title: Boutique experience
items.description: Limited intake. Every case gets the time it deserves.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy (GDPR)
privacy.content:
In accordance with the provisions of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), we inform you that the personal data you provide by filling out this form will be processed by Luxury Smile Architects.

The purpose of the collection and processing of this data is to manage the contact request and send you information related to your interest. Legitimization is carried out through your express consent.

You can exercise your rights of access, rectification, limitation, and deletion of data by writing to our email, as well as the right to file a claim with a supervisory authority.
